news_items.title: New ways to keep Google Cloud certifications current and boost your career
news_items.summary: If you’re reading this, you’ve likely already done the hard work to prove your qualifications with a Google Cloud certification. history_item.title: FORTRAN, the first widely used high-level language
history_item.description: IBM delivered FORTRAN in 1957, proving that compiled high-level languages could rival hand-written assembly for scientific computing.
